title: thamnosma texana var. purpurea
intro: Thamnosma texana var. purpurea, also known as Purple Thamnosma or Desert Bitterbrush, is a shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, belonging to the Rutaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Thamnosma texana var. purpurea include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. This plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, as well as being used in traditional remedies, but its uses and preparations should be researched and used under the guidance of a medical professional.
